div.div:
AI Decision Engine
Priority
/100
Route
%
Link
%

div.class: alert alert-danger border-start border-danger border-3 mb-2

sheet.div: ESCALATED — This email has been escalated to top management.

div.class: alert alert-warning border-start border-warning border-3 mb-2

sheet.div: OVERDUE — This email has been unresolved for more than 3 days.

field.name: notes
field.placeholder: Add internal notes, action items, or context…

page.name: tab_operational

div.class: alert alert-info border-start border-info border-3 mb-3

page.div: No operational links detected yet. The engine scans automatically after classification. Use Refresh Links to re-scan manually, or select a document directly in any field below.

div.small: You can also manually select any document below to override the auto-detected link.

page.name: tab_intelligence

div.class: alert alert-warning border-start border-warning border-3 mb-2

page.div: NOT ASSIGNED — This email has no assigned user. Please assign it to the right person.

div.class: alert alert-danger border-start border-danger border-3 mb-2

page.div: NEEDS ACTION — This email requires action and is still in new/assigned state.

field.name: help
field.p: Emails are automatically captured from incoming mail servers. You can also use the Scan Now button on the dashboard to import emails immediately.
